assessmentQuestionVersion.name: OBSTETRICAL/GYNECOLOGICAL PROCEDURES
assessmentQuestionVersion.questionText:
OBSTETRICAL/GYNECOLOGICAL PROCEDURES – INCLUDING:
  • Performance of pelvic examination
  • Evaluation and management of pelvic pain
  • Evaluation and management of sexually transmitted diseases
  • Evaluation and management of early pregnancy/minor vaginal bleed/discharge
  • Incision and drainage of Bartolin cyst/placement of Word catheter
  • Evaluation and management of minor vaginal bleeding/discharge
